name: artu-teams
description: Connect your machine to an Artu Teams server

scripts.build: node --input-type=module -e "import esbuild from 'esbuild'; await esbuild.build({ entryPoints: ['src/index.ts'], bundle: true, platform: 'node', target: 'node18', format: 'esm', outfile: 'dist/index.js', banner: { js: '#!/usr/bin/env node' }, external: ['ws'], treeShaking: true });" && chmod +x dist/index.js
